description: AI MCP server provides an overview of a Model Context Protocol server (locally-executed tools exposed over the MCP protocol).

ID.description: ID is the identifier of the object.
ID.title: ID

actionScope.description: Classification of actions the MCP server can perform (Read-only, Read + Write, Autonomous write / execute).
actionScope.title: actionScope

actionScopeRisk.description: Risk assessment for the action scope pillar.
actionScopeRisk.title: actionScopeRisk

categories.description: The categories associated with the MCP server.
categories.title: categories

dataSensitivity.description: Classification of data the MCP server can access (Public data only, Internal / PII, Credentials / Code / Health).
dataSensitivity.title: dataSensitivity

dataSensitivityRisk.description: Risk assessment for the data sensitivity pillar.
dataSensitivityRisk.title: dataSensitivityRisk

description.description: A brief description about the AI MCP server and its purpose.
description.title: description

displayName.description: The human-friendly name of the MCP server.
displayName.title: displayName

executionContextRisk.description: Risk assessment for the execution context pillar.
executionContextRisk.title: executionContextRisk

importHash.description: The hash of the structure used to compare with new import version.
importHash.title: importHash

importLabel.description: The user-defined import label that allows the system to group resources from the same import operation.
importLabel.title: importLabel

llmProviders.description: LLM providers that this MCP server is typically invoked from (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.).
llmProviders.title: llmProviders

name.description: The name of the MCP server.
name.title: name

platform.description: The host runtime where the MCP server runs (local, container, remote).
platform.title: platform

propagate.description: Propagates the object to all child namespaces. This is always true.
propagate.title: propagate

publishedDate.description: When the MCP server was published.
publishedDate.title: publishedDate

publisherName.description: The publisher name of the MCP server.
publisherName.title: publisherName

risk.description: Overall risk assessment for the MCP server.
risk.title: risk

source.description: Marketplace or origin the entry was discovered from (github, mcp_registry, etc.).
source.title: source

tags.description: The tags associated with the MCP server.
tags.title: tags

trust.description: Classification of publisher trust (Major enterprise vendor, Established third party, Unvetted / community).
trust.title: trust

trustRisk.description: Risk assessment for the publisher trust pillar.
trustRisk.title: trustRisk

updateTime.description: Last update date of the object.
updateTime.title: updateTime

vetted.description: Flag to say if the MCP server has been vetted by Acuvity or not.
vetted.title: vetted

title: AIMCPServer
